Celestial Healing  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints v2 by 14 (L44) to 188 (L43) per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 225 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 4 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: Yes Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Celestial light pumps through your body.
Cast on other: Soandso 's body is covered with a soft glow.
Effect Fades: The celestial light fades.

Game Description

Fills your target's body with celestial power, healing between 14 and 188 hit points every 6 seconds for 24 secs (4 ticks).

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Celestial Healing
  • Yalienn's Water Sprinkler

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Celestial Healing
ClassLevel
CLR44
Expansion:

Duration:
4 ticks
  • Comments (22)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (38)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Vicar Thiran - 36pp 9gp 1sp 1cp

Found as loot


Cobalt Scar
    a bulthar
    a bulthar herdleader
Great Divide
    a guardian shardwurm
    an ancient shardwurm
    an elder shardwurm

    Royal Scribe Kaavin

    Yeinn Kor`Va
Velketor's Labyrinth
    a cold shade
    a cold spectre

    a crystalline gargoyle
    a crystalline shard
    a Frenzied Velium Broodling
    a Frenzied Velium Stalker
    a frost spectre
    a large crystal shard
    a velium broodling
    a velium stalker
    an Icepaw champion
    an Icepaw cleric
    an Icepaw kobold
    an Icepaw kobold priest
    an Icepaw kobold warrior
    an Icepaw prophet
    an icy watcher
    Crystal Eyes
    Crystal Fang
    Crystal Guardian
    Errkak Icepaw
    Icepaw kobold
    Icy Guardian
    Jelek Icepaw
    Marlek Icepaw
    Rowwek Icepaw
    Tpos Icepaw
    Ular Icepaw
    Venar Icepaw
Wakening Land

Post Comment
barrier
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2005 at 12:05 AM Rating: Default
Trabik
184 posts
Another reason why this spell might not land on someone other than them having 15 buff slots filled, is if they are a cleric and they have their barrier activated. So if you try to heal a fellow cleric who is under attack and it's not landing that might be the case.
▲ Page top
Celestial healing
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2005 at 7:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966266377
7 posts
Still drops. Got mine off a Ancient shardworm. The Elders dont drop spells. I got almost all the drop spells for these lvl range while hunting for this one. Took a total of 3 hours.
▲ Page top
Not hard
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2004 at 1:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786134075
Scholar
35 posts
This spell is not all that hard to get.

I had read that the Elder Shardwurms do not drop it, so we just farmed the Ancient Shardwurms in the caves in the Great Divide until it dropped.

Took maybe an hour to drop 20 of the Ancients, got a fist full of level 44 spells for other classes, and this one.

As far as group, it was just two of us, Level 44 cleric and Level 57 beastlord, and we had an easy time of it.





▲ Page top
just level
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2004 at 1:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591810039588
View User Forum
18 posts
In the grand scheme of things you can get along quite well without this spell... So why not just spend the time you would on this spell on getting massive amounts of experience? your CH is about all you will really need... and if it draws tooo much agro its because your tank is a dumb **** that cant hold agro... if you NEED this spell and CANT live without it... then cough up some plat and buy it from the baz, or even ask your guild if they have it in the bank. OR you could raid (i forgot the name of the zone, but they have a bunch of golems that drop random 51+ spells) and prob get a good chance at getting it there, and if not take one of the other spells put it up in the bazaar and use the profit from that to buy the spell while you sleep. Many other ways to get this spell that are much easier then camping somewhere for hours upon hours. Now some of ya'll get lucky and get it on the 1st or 2nd mobs, but for the rest of us we will chill there for 10 or so hours. Thats just my opinion...
▲ Page top
tell me some thing
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2004 at 7:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591819087253
2 posts
hay is it hard to get this spell ??
▲ Page top
RE: tell me some thing
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2004 at 10:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804008849
1 post
Yea,..from my experience on Morden Rasp it is. At a new lvl of 44, I went in quest for this spell. I actually manage to get to lvl 49, and still haven't found the spell. So I've given up on it and look forward to increasing my defense skills. At any rate a cleric isn't as frail as some people think. We can get our hp just as high as some of our tanks. So unless you absolutely postively gotta have this spell, avoid wasting a lot of time looking for it. I'm now lvl 52, and am getting along fine without it.
▲ Page top
Velks (The Village)
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2004 at 1:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591811308177
1 post
This spell has a much higher drop rate in the Village in Velketor's Labyrinth. First mob we killed dropped the spell (Okay we got extremely lucky) but I have camped up here a fair amount trying to get the spell for friends and we have never had to camp for very long. The longest time was two hours.
▲ Page top
this is bs.
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2004 at 1:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795760773
7 posts
i have camped the shardwurms for 3 days with my 53 mage, and nothing. there is noway my 44 cleric could even think about getting this spell. temp was way easier then this. I think I will survive without it.
▲ Page top
RE: this is bs.
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2004 at 1:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760664656
103 posts
Never mind the fact that this is the best HoT spell a cleric gets until level 59 and you can pick this up while hunting for shard wurm bile with your guild.

-Forzz, 42 DE Cleric <evil legions> Drinal
▲ Page top
NOT sold in Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2004 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775161694
View User Forum
62 posts
Just logged in to verify this is absolutely NOT sold in Bazaar by Jolum, I have submitted correction to management because it IS listed in his inventory of spells for sale on this website.

Again the only way to get it, is to hunt it.
▲ Page top
What's Happening
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2004 at 2:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254458946
43 posts
What would keep this spell from landing, I've been getting message that this spell would not take hold. It doesn't happen all the time just sometimes but will land later on same Target.
▲ Page top
RE: What's Happening
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2004 at 1:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779109711
934 posts
well if your target already has all 15 buff slots full then it wouldn't land cause it like all other HoT's requires a buff slot and second if there was a better HoT already on the target it wouldn't stick
▲ Page top
It does drop
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 9:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794172808
12 posts
While hunting the shard worm caves in GD for glowing worm bile I have found 2 of these spells so far one off an elder another off an ancient. The crystaline worms do not drop this as far as I have seen!
▲ Page top
Cel heal
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2004 at 6:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966378966
35 posts
My 52 Monk and 52 shammy was just in that room of 5 crystalineshard wurms, and after 4 hours of camping i got amny spells including 4 wakening tp druid spells. No sign however of the grand cel heal spell for my 43 cleric. This realy ticked me off. I dont doubt your story Fallen, you however were flat just......Lucky. This is a rare drop, and i guess Velks is a far better place to go. I wonder wether my 43 cleric can go in there to hunt though at her lvl.

amazingly....

# Nov 19 2003 at 1:00 AM Rating: Default

49 posts
This spell dropped for me on the 2nd elder shardwurm i killed. my friend hunted them for 9 hours

Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2003 at 10:08 AM Rating: Default
dylanpfunk
11 posts
This spell can be purchased from Jolum. He is the Gnome in the red robe on the second floor of the building with all the merchants in it.

Actually, Jolum in the Bazaar sells Celestial Health, which is the level 29 spell, not 44 Celestial Healing...

Darn, guess I'll have to hunt for it, hehe.

Hard
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2003 at 10:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570883358
2 posts
This spell is nearly impossible to find and truly difficult for a group of 40's to find in Great Divide. And seemingly never sold in bazaar. This spell shouldn't be this hard at lvl 44. Got my Temperance spell easier than this.

Tooburly
46 Cleric
Union of the Half Pint

▲ Page top
Shurdwurms!? I dont think so
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 3:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788886728
36 posts
If the Shurdwurms drop this it is EXTREMELY RARE from them. I have had shaman, wizzy, druid, necro spells drop fairly easy but not this one! I took my 57 Enchanter over to kill so it would go fast. 3 days later still no Celestial healing spell. Gave Velk's a try dropped within couple of hours. Best advice head to Velk's dont waste your time in GD.
▲ Page top
drop rate
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2003 at 12:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779219070
6 posts
well, i read a lot of posts that the drop rate ins quick on this spell, i don't believe it. Ive been to the Shardwurm room with the 5 sharwurms that just stand there several times. killed them all cycle after cycle. still no drop. They have dropped a million other spells, no this one. If you want this spell. this is where you go to get it or buy it from another place. I'm just letting you know that the people that post that it drops a lot are probably just lucky.

# Feb 04 2003 at 3:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592256553466
4 posts
This is by far one of my best spells a cleric can have. I have this one in slot #7 and complete heal in slot #8. I use Celestial Healing because it doesn't give me ARGO.
